title: Explorer Maps
description: Makes it possible to create explorer maps without villagers, using only a map and an item to create
body:
Have you ever wanted to find a certain structure, but didn't even know where to start?

**Well, this datapack/mod brings the solution!** With 11 maps, each created using 1 (one) empty map in the mainhand and the structure's respective item in the offhand.

## Structures / Items
### Overworld
- Ancient City / Sculk
- Desert Pyramid / Smooth Sandstone
- Igloo / Ice
- Jungle Temple / Gold Ingot
- Woodland Mansion / Emerald Block
- Ocean Monument / Diamond
- Pillager Outpost / Crossbow
- Swamp Hut / Mud
- Trail Ruins / Brush
- Trial Chambers / Copper Block

### End
- End City / Eye of Ender
